The problem

Right now, you're doing your best for every client, but there's no clear way to give them aftercare that reflects your professionalism without eating into your time and profit.

✗

A WhatsApp looks like an afterthought, and it's buried in the chat by Friday.

✗

A Canva PDF eats an unpaid hour, then expires the second their routine changes.

✗

Either way, your reputation and your bottom line pay for it.

The solution

Meet Leida, the app designed to elevate your aftercare.

Built in minutes. Beautiful and easy to follow. Always up to date.

Up close

Everything your client gets, on one page.

Here’s what’s inside.

Quick

A full, considered routine built in minutes, not the unpaid hour a PDF swallows.

Always up to date

Change one product and their page updates the instant you save. Never stale.

Personalised for you

Their page wears your name and your branding, not ours. You stay front and centre where you belong.

Personalised for them

Their name, their skin, the products they actually use. Every page is built around the client in front of you.

Never off the shelf

You choose the products and add a little context. Leida blends it into something that feels made by hand, not pulled from a template.

Clickable shopping links

Every product links straight through to buy. No “what was that serum called again?”

Why this matters

Aftercare isn't just admin. It's how you grow.

A client who follows their routine sees results. Results are what make them rebook, refer, and stay. Good aftercare pays for itself.

A 5% rise in client retention can lift profits by 25% to 95%.

Bain & Company / Reichheld, via Harvard Business Review

Winning a new client costs 5 to 25 times more than keeping one.

Bain & Company / Harvard Business Review

From the founder

I built Leida because I was the therapist drowning in admin.

Hi, I'm Millie. I trained as a skin therapist to do work I loved on a schedule that fit around my young family. I loved the work. What I didn't love was how much time I spent on my phone doing the admin that running a small business requires.

One of the biggest drains was homecare. Being a perfectionist, and knowing how vital aftercare was to my results, I'd sometimes spend 30 minutes putting recommendations together for one client. Despite it feeling like it took me ages, the standard still wasn't as high as I'd like as it was just a (very long) WhatsApp message with some links thrown in.

So I set to work while the toddler slept, armed with an iPad and a mission.

And Leida was born.

Millie xx

The reaction

Questions

FAQs

Is this a real app?+
It's a web app, it works instantly in any browser with nothing to download. Your client can add it to their home screen so it looks and behaves just like a native app or simply view it in their browser, whatever they prefer. No App Store, and much quicker updates. Looks great on iPhone, Android, iPad and desktop.
How is this different from a PDF?+
A PDF is fixed the moment you send it. As soon as your client's routine changes, it's out of date and you're having to remake it. Leida works differently: you edit their page and it updates for them instantly. Same link, always current.
How long does it take to build?+
Minutes, because you're never starting from scratch. Your products, tips and aftercare advice already live in Leida, ready to drop in, and you can add, edit or remove anything whenever you like. You choose what this client needs, and Leida does the rest: it pulls in the links, photos and descriptions, then cross-references their skin and your notes to explain why each step is right for them. In-depth and personal, but built in minutes, and updates take seconds.
How does my client get access?+
You create a profile for them and send them a link, that's it. They create their own password, so you don't need to get involved. You don't need to send anything else when you make an update either, they already have access.
Can I use my own branding?+
Yes. Your client's page carries your name and your look, not Leida's. You stay front and centre.
Can clients see previous versions?+
Yes. Each page keeps its history, so clients can look back at where their routine started.
Can I cancel?+
Yes, any time, from your account. Your founding rate only lapses if you fully cancel.

Send clients home with something you're proud of.

The speed of a WhatsApp message, the polish of a Canva PDF, and always up to date. Give every client one living aftercare page.
